name: Billie Jean King
abstract: Billie Jean King (née Moffitt; born November 22, 1943) is an American former world No. 1 tennis player.

concerts.label: HISTORYTalks™
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ellen Rowe

about_quotes.doc_title: Ellen Rowe interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 2, 2024
